name: Abatement or Refund for Lost or Destroyed Spirits

eligibility.description: Applies to spirits lost in bond; requires filing a claim and proving the loss was not due to connivance, collusion, fraud, or negligence.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Taxes are not collected (or are refunded if already paid) on distilled spirits lost or destroyed while in bond, including accidental destruction or non-negligent theft.
